title: Freyr Technology AI Renews NVIDIA Preferred Cloud Partner Status
summary: Freyr Technology AI has renewed its NVIDIA Preferred Cloud Partner — Compute competency status within the NVIDIA Partner Network.
body_html:
We are pleased to announce that Freyr Technology AI Pte. Ltd. has officially renewed its NVIDIA Preferred Cloud Partner – Compute competency status within the NVIDIA Partner Network (NPN) program, effective April 15, 2026.

Scalable compute for the next generation of AI

This renewed status reflects Freyr AI’s continued focus on dependable, high-performance infrastructure for AI builders and enterprises around the world.
